fields.title: Remove main-session prompt modes
fields.description: Tau still has user-facing prompt modes: /mode, mode prompt injection in before_agent_start, mode persistence, promptModes settings, and footer display. The requested behavior is for main sessions to use Pi's normal selected model/thinking and for specialized behavior to happen through subagents.
fields.design: Delete the PromptModes facade and ExecutionRuntime mode-switching behavior as a main-session feature. Remove /mode command registration, before_agent_start mode prompt injection, tau:mode:changed events, promptModes settings parsing, mode prompt files after smart/deep/rush are copied into agent definitions, and mode text from the footer. Keep concrete capture/apply helpers only where loops need to pin model/thinking/tool policy; rename or reshape them so they do not expose mode selectors.
fields.acceptance_criteria: /mode is not registered. No main-session system prompt is appended from a mode prompt file. The footer shows model/thinking and sandbox/status data without a mode label. Persisted tau state no longer writes selector.mode or modelsByMode for normal sessions. promptModes settings are not read as configuration. Tests that previously asserted mode switching are removed or rewritten around subagent spawning and concrete execution contracts.
